title: poa fragilis
intro: Poa fragilis, also known as Fragile Meadow-grass, is a perennial grass species native to mountainous regions in Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and ease respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Poa fragilis include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Poa fragilis typically involve drying and crushing the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
